plate2N 0.0.2
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

blank_correct_abs()
Transform Raw Absorbance Data into Blank-corrected Absorbance
boxplot_outlier_extr()
Identify outlier-wells within plates containing suspicious extractant data
correct_std_blank()
Replaces raw absorbance data from standard curves by blank-corrected absorbance values.
csv_to_tibble()
Import 96-well plate data in csv format
extract_curve()
Get concentration of standard curve from metadata
extract_extractant()
Extracting "extractant" data (blank for samples) from plate tidy table
extract_std_blanc()
Extraction and Quality Check (QC) of blank values for standard curves
extract_std_data()
Keeps only wells corresponding to standard curves
extractant_average()
Computing the per-plate average for raw absorbance of the extractant (blank for samples)
failed_wells_example
Example of failed well table
failed_wells_template()
Generate a template to record "failed wells"
join_abs_map()
Merging 2 vertical plates into one
lm_output
Example of Outputs from the Linear Model of the Standard Curves
lm_std_curve()
Perform Linear Model for Standard Curve
metadata
Example of plate metadata
molar_masses
Record of molar masses for studied compounds
multiplot_outlier_extr()
Multiple distribution plot to review suspicious extractant values and spot outliers
plot_blank_var_distrib()
Plot dataset-wide distribution of withing-plate variation for extractant data
plot_list_lm()
Compute a list of plots, one per standard curve
plot_std()
Display one or more standard curve(s)
qc_raw_abs()
Quality Check (QC) of raw absorbance data
qc_raw_extr()
Quality check of raw absorbance data for extractant wells
remove_wells()
Clean a tidy table from undesired wells
skanit_to_tibble()
Import 96-well plate data from Skanit format
std_corrected
Example of Blank-corrected Data for Standard Curve
suspicious_extr()
Extract suspicious extractant wells
suspicious_lm()
Extract Suspicious Rows from Linear Model Data (non-significance, Non-normality, heteroscedasticity)
tibble_example
Example of a tibble format for plate data
tibble_to_list()
Converts plates data from tibble to a list
tidy_plates
Example of Tidy table of plate data
tidy_table
Example of Tidy table of plate data
txt_to_tibble()
Imports 96-well plate data from .TXT format as exported from the plate reader
vertical_plates
Example of the verticalized plate data
vertical_to_tidy()
From vertical plate data to tidy data using the tidyr package
verticalize_plates()
Tidying plate data (verticalization)
